summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. No GitHub mutations are planned. All seed PRs are open and non-security-sensitive in the hydrated preflight artifact, but none has complete merge preflight with clean checks, resolved review-bot state, and passed Codex /review proof.

actions.reason: Small, useful contributor PR for the linked Feishu pagination bug, but failed checks and missing review proof block merge. Repair/re-review the contributor branch before any merge recommendation.

This is a plausible narrower replacement or repair path for the missing-file heartbeat behavior, but it overlaps #85225 and lacks final merge preflight. A maintainer-safe repair should choose one canonical heartbeat PR before merge.

Broad maintainer-owned refactor on a non-main base with pending checks. The job explicitly requires human judgment for broad code deltas, so this should stay on maintainer review rather than Clownfish repair or merge.
Tiny focused gateway PR with a plausible fix path, but real-behavior proof/review completion is inconsistent or missing. Repair should supply proof and complete review before merge.
Small focused contributor PR for the linked voice-call latency bug, but failed type checks and missing final review preflight block merge. Repair the branch and rerun validation before merge.
Keep open as a related broader product/config tracker; it is not fixed by the narrow missing-file heartbeat PRs.
The issue is related to #94015, but post-merge closeout is disabled and the candidate fix is not merge-ready.
Related to #94002 and #85225, but should remain open until the selected heartbeat PR lands and maintainers decide the product behavior.
Keep as related canonical-family context for the heartbeat work; choose or repair one heartbeat PR before merge instead of closing or merging either path in this plan.
Related to #94000, but keep open until a validated fix lands; post-merge closeout is disabled.
Historical linked context only; no mutation should be emitted for an already closed issue.
Emit a cluster-scoped repair artifact so an executor can repair contributor branches or raise a replacement PR only where branch repair cannot safely converge.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair narrow contributor PRs before merge consideration; do not touch the broad maintainer-owned SQLite refactor. No closure or comment mutations are allowed in this job.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Clownfish repair plan for live-pr-inventory-20260617T082059-002.

Targets:
- Repair Feishu drive pagination from #94000 for #93928 if failed extension boundary/check issues are branch-related and Codex /review passes.
- Resolve heartbeat canonical choice between #94002 and #85225, preserving contributor credit, then validate the selected narrow missing-file idle heartbeat path.
- Repair #94005 only after real behavior proof is passing and ClawSweeper review completes.
- Repair #94015 by fixing the failing type check and rerunning targeted voice-call validation.

Out of scope:
- #94004 broad maintainer SQLite/memory/proxy refactor; requires maintainer review.
- Closing issues or PRs; blocked by job frontmatter.

Validation:
- pnpm check:changed
- targeted Vitest commands for touched surfaces
- Codex /review before merge recommendation

Credit:
Source PR authors are credited in commits/PR body where their patches are repaired or replaced.
validation_commands: run the Feishu drive pagination targeted tests or add a focused mock/API regression if absent
run the gateway Tailscale targeted test or add a focused regression for reset-before-serve behavior
Codex /review on any PR before merge recommendation
